title: Faulty Deque Operations: Incorrect Handling of Middle Element

statement.markdown:
Given a deque, perform the following operations:
* Delete the middle element (if present).
* Add a new element to the left of the deque.

Your function should modify the input deque.
statement.inputFormat: A deque with elements of arbitrary type.
statement.notes: If the deque has an odd number of elements, delete the middle element. Otherwise, do nothing.

examples.explanation: Middle element is 4, so it's deleted.
Deque has an even number of elements, so no middle element is deleted.
